overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Unity showing an assassin character in 18th-century attire walking through the Central Market of Les Halles in Paris. The character navigates from narrow cobblestone market streets into the open plaza of Église Saint-Eustache, passing period architecture, market stalls, and crowds of NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone market street with outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow market street, passing outdoor dining tables and market stalls

notable_agents.action: patrons sitting at wooden outdoor tables eating and conversing

entered.detail: historic stone apartment buildings with shuttered windows
rustic wooden dining tables and chairs with seated patrons
wooden market cart with canvas covering
temporary wooden plank walkway laid over cobblestones

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, sunlit cobblestone market street lined with historic stone buildings. On the right, patrons sit at outdoor wooden tables, while market carts and stalls line the path ahead. The camera follows smoothly from behind as the character approaches the open plaza.

events.description: exits narrow market street into open plaza of Les Halles, text overlay appears
character continues walking toward the church facade as the plaza opens up

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the large church building, navigating around market stalls

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking across the plaza in various directions

entered.detail: large classical church with Corinthian columns and twin towers
stone statue group on tall plinth in the plaza center
wooden market stall with fabric canopy

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide sunlit plaza as the character emerges from the narrow street. The massive Saint-Eustache church dominates the view ahead with its classical facade and columns. Market stalls and a central statue occupy the cobblestone plaza as the character walks toward the church entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: church plaza with fountain and classical statues

events.description: text overlay 'Église Saint-Eustache' appears as character approaches the fountain
character turns slightly right to walk around the church facade

agents.ego_description: walking around the church plaza, passing the central fountain and examining the architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting on stone bench near the statue

entered.detail: octagonal stone fountain with water basin in the plaza
large stone pedestal with sculptural group
grand staircase leading to church entrance with columns

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the grand plaza in front of Saint-Eustache, passing an ornate stone fountain and classical statues on plinths. The ground transitions to large stone paving slabs. The character circles around the right side of the church, moving from the open facade toward a narrower side passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage beside church with covered wooden market

events.description: enters shaded narrow passage along the side of the church building
moves into darker covered market area with wooden roofing

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow side passage of the church, entering the covered market area

notable_agents.action: market vendor standing beside wooden stall

entered.detail: covered market structure with wooden posts and lattice walls
wooden cart loaded with goods parked against the wall
stone staircase leading up to church side entrance

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open plaza into a narrow, shadowed passage running alongside the church wall. The lighting becomes darker and more contrasted. The character enters a covered wooden market structure with lattice walls, where vendors and shoppers occupy the confined cobblestone space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit market street into a grand open plaza before descending into a shadowed side passage. It begins by following the character through a narrow cobblestone street lined with stone buildings and outdoor cafe tables, moving steadily toward a break in the architecture. As the character emerges, the scene opens into a wide, bright plaza dominated by the massive classical facade and columns of the Saint-Eustache church. The camera then tracks across the expansive stone paving, passing ornate fountains and statues on plinths before circling around the right side of the church. Finally, the environment shifts from the open sunlight into a narrow, shadowed passage, where the character enters a covered wooden market structure with lattice walls and contrasting light.
